reports.title: Visualização Topológica da Rede (Amostra)
reports.query:
MATCH (n:Gene)-[r:CO_EXPRESSES_WITH]->(m:Gene)
RETURN n, r, m
LIMIT 300

reports.title: Top 10 Hubs (Centralidade de Grau)
reports.query:
MATCH (g:Gene)-[r:CO_EXPRESSES_WITH]-()
RETURN g.id AS Gene, count(r) AS Total_Conexoes
ORDER BY Total_Conexoes DESC
LIMIT 10

reports.title: Master Regulators (Alcance Global)
reports.query:
MATCH (alvo:Gene)-[:CO_EXPRESSES_WITH]-(vizinho:Gene)-[:CO_EXPRESSES_WITH]-(secundario:Gene)
WHERE alvo <> secundario
RETURN alvo.id AS Gene_Alvo, count(DISTINCT secundario) AS Alcance_Sistemico
ORDER BY Alcance_Sistemico DESC
LIMIT 10

reports.title: Métrica de Força Regulatória
reports.query:
MATCH (g:Gene)-[r:CO_EXPRESSES_WITH]-()
RETURN g.id AS Gene, sum(abs(r.weight)) AS Forca_Absoluta
ORDER BY Forca_Absoluta DESC
LIMIT 10
